name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-74
title: test-RABBIT-CAGE-19-confirm-token-override.py t1 uses overly specific substring (would miss reformatted wording)
description: test-RABBIT-CAGE-19-confirm-token-override.py t1 (line 49): asserts 'only a human creates this file' is NOT in spec. If the spec ever rephrases to e.g. 'only a human creates the file', the assertion silently passes (the test stops detecting the prohibited concept) even though the prohibited concept may have returned. Use a regex like r'only.*human.*create.*file' to catch reformulations.

history.note: Wave 4 triage: duplicate of RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-76 (test-RABBIT-CAGE-19 substring)
